skills.name: backlog-hygiene
skills.description: Cleans your backlog. Detects stale items, duplicates, dependency chains, and implicit items buried inside notes that should be tracked separately.

skills.name: bot-grow-specialist
skills.description: Evolve lead bot specialists from friction observations to autonomous subagents. Use when conversations fail, responses miss the mark, or lead handling breaks down.

skills.name: create-syner
skills.description: Scaffold syner components. Orchestrates creation of skills, agents, and apps by delegating to specialized skills. Use when creating new components or when the user says "crear", "new", "scaffold".

skills.name: create-syner-agent
skills.description: Create syner agents. Use when creating new agents, or when user says "crear agente", "new agent", "subagent".

skills.name: create-syner-app
skills.description: Scaffold new applications following the syner common stack. Use when creating new apps, projects, or when the user says "nueva app", "create app", "new project", or "scaffold".

skills.name: create-syner-skill
skills.description: Create syner skills. Use when creating new skills, or when user says "crear skill", "new skill", "add capability".

skills.name: dev-find-ideas
skills.description: Generate ideas by combining expert perspectives. Use when you want fresh ideas, need creative inspiration, say "find ideas", "combine experts", "brainstorm", or want to explore what emerges from crossing disciplines.

skills.name: dev-grow-specialist
skills.description: Evolve ecosystem building specialists from friction observations to autonomous subagents. Use when skill creation fails, reviews miss issues, tests are unclear, or maintenance patterns repeat.

skills.name: find-ideas
skills.description: Orchestrate the ideas system. Mine vaults for ideas, analyze maturity, and route to the right skill or agent. The entry point for idea discovery that connects find-links, grow-note, track-idea, and cross-app routing.

skills.name: find-links
skills.description: Bridge two domains you've been circling. Find unexpected connections between two different areas, topics, or projects in your notes. Use when you sense a link but can't articulate it, or to discover non-obvious relationships.

skills.name: github-cli
skills.description: Use gh CLI directly for all GitHub operations including issues, PRs, and API calls. Use when interacting with GitHub from the command line.

skills.name: github-create-pr
skills.description: Create GitHub PRs using templates. Use when "crear pr", "create pr", "abrir pr", "open pr", "submit pr".

skills.name: grow-note
skills.description: Promote daily thoughts into real assets. Transform scattered daily notes, fleeting thoughts, and rough ideas into structured, actionable documents. Use when a thought has matured enough to become a proper article, plan, or reference document.

skills.name: load-all
skills.description: Load your full life + work state. Discovers and reads all notes across all app vaults, building a unified context of your knowledge, projects, goals, and current thinking. Use when starting a new session or when you need the AI to understand your complete situation.

skills.name: syner
skills.description: Orchestrator for tasks that need your personal context. Routes to specialists or executes directly. Use when the task spans multiple areas, benefits from understanding your full situation, or you're unsure which skill to use. Loads context proportionally - simple requests get simple responses.

skills.name: syner-boundaries
skills.description: Validate that proposals respect Syner's operational boundaries. Use before executing significant actions, when reviewing skill outputs, or when unsure if an approach stays within limits. Triggers on "check boundaries", "validate approach", "is this within scope", or before destructive/complex operations.

skills.name: syner-daily-briefing
skills.description: Daily coach that tells you what to do first. Analyzes GitHub activity, detects patterns, and gives opinionated recommendations. Use when asked for "briefing", "daily status", or on scheduled CI runs.

skills.name: syner-enhance-skills
skills.description: Improve an existing skill by auditing and applying fixes. Use when asked to "enhance skill", "improve skill", "fix skill issues", or when code-reviewer detects skill file changes. Delegates to syner-skill-reviewer for audit, then proposes and applies fixes with user confirmation.

skills.name: syner-fix-symlinks
skills.description: Fix skill and agent symlinks. Use when symlinks are broken, skills/agents not showing up, or after creating new ones.

skills.name: syner-gh-auth
skills.description: Authenticate gh CLI using GitHub App tokens. Use BEFORE any gh command (issues, PRs, API calls). Use when gh auth fails, when "not logged in" errors appear, or proactively before GitHub operations.

skills.name: syner-grow-orchestration
skills.description: Evolve orchestration decisions through maturity levels (L0→L3). Use when routing is unclear, components overlap, context loading is wrong, or boundaries are violated.

skills.name: syner-readme-enhancer
skills.description: Enhance READMEs for apps and packages by analyzing actual code. Detects maturity level, special capabilities (plan mode), and generates honest, focused READMEs. Use when creating or updating README files.

skills.name: syner-skill-reviewer
skills.description: Review skills for quality, safety, and convention compliance. Use when auditing a skill's instructions, checking for prompt injection risks, first-person voice issues, or verifying best practices. Triggers on "review this skill", "audit skill", "check skill quality", "is this skill safe", or when evaluating skills before publishing.

skills.name: test-syner-agent
skills.description: Test syner agents using output-first methodology. Use when testing an agent, validating behavior, or debugging agent output.

skills.name: track-idea
skills.description: Track idea evolution - proactively surfaces evolved ideas worth revisiting, or traces a specific concept manually.

skills.name: update-syner-app
skills.description: Update existing applications to match the current syner standard stack. Ensures all apps maintain the same foundation and tooling.

skills.name: vaults-grow-specialist
skills.description: Evolve PKM specialists from friction observations to autonomous subagents. Use when the ideas system fails you, when retrieval breaks, or when synthesis falls short.

skills.name: vercel-setup
skills.description: Configure Vercel environment variables for syner.bot. Use when deploying the bot, setting up env vars, or troubleshooting deployment issues.

skills.name: whats-next
skills.description: Tells you what to work on today. Synthesizes backlog items, grow observations, tasks, and GitHub issues into an opinionated action plan with prioritization and cross-referencing.

skills.name: workflow-reviewer
skills.description: Review GitHub Actions workflows before running. Use when about to trigger a workflow, debugging workflow failures, or auditing workflow logic. Triggers on "review workflow", "check this workflow", "before I run this", "why did this fail".
